entity.name: Vadym Nahornyi
entity.description: AI solution architect based in Valencia, Spain. Building open source AI tools that serve users rather than platforms. Running Nahornyi AI Lab, focused on AI architecture, LLM security, and agent orchestration.

projects.name: Overhuman
projects.description: A self-evolving open source AI daemon written in Go. Learns through repetition, auto-generates code skills to replace expensive LLM calls, and generates unique visual interfaces from scratch for every response. Ships as a single 15MB binary with under 10MB RAM footprint. Supports 8+ LLM providers including local models via Ollama, 6 input channels, and MCP for tool integration. 981 tests across 21 packages.

channels.description: GitHub Sponsors — support Overhuman development with one-time or recurring donations.
Direct bank transfer available. Please contact via email for details.

plans.name: Core Development
plans.description: Fund ongoing development of Overhuman: self-learning engine, generative UI, multi-channel support, security hardening, and community infrastructure.

plans.name: Monthly Development Support
plans.description: Recurring monthly support to sustain active development and maintenance of Overhuman.

plans.name: Goodwill support
plans.description: Any amount to show your support for the project.
